mapper.select: select id, user_id, goods_id, sku_id, quantity, checked, create_time, update_time from cart_item where user_id = #{userId} and sku_id = #{skuId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cart_item(user_id, goods_id, sku_id, quantity, checked) values (#{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{checked})
mapper.select: select ci.id, ci.goods_id, ci.sku_id, ci.quantity, ci.checked, g.title, g.pic, s.price, s.stock, s.sku_attrs, ci.create_time, ci.update_time from cart_item ci join goods g on g.id = ci.goods_id join sku s on s.sku_id = ci.sku_id where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.id desc

select ci.id, ci.goods_id, ci.sku_id, ci.quantity, ci.checked, g.title, g.pic, s.price, s.stock, s.sku_attrs, ci.create_time, ci.update_time from cart_item ci join goods g on g.id = ci.goods_id join sku s on s.sku_id = ci.sku_id where ci.user_id = #{userId} and ci.checked = 1 order by ci.id asc
